nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere executor of predefined tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I often use ChatGPT as a sounding board, ideation partner

nodes.label: AI for fundamental understanding and learning
nodes.label_negative: AI as opaque black box without explanation

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Blind trust in AI without verification
nodes.grounding_span: anything that I do take forward is always supported by secondary 'trust, but verify' research

nodes.label: Human-in-the-loop control over AI actions
nodes.grounding_span: I would always operate on a 'human-in-the-loop' approach

nodes.label: AI as collaborative conversational partner
nodes.grounding_span: It is always conversational and collaborative

nodes.label: AI as force multiplier for efficiency
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for unskilled workers
nodes.grounding_span: AI can make you better at your job and allow you to evidence your worth

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: I have been a staunch advocate and evangelist

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it feels much more comfortable and efficient to work through this in natural language

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: improving understanding, and being able to quickly move on with your project

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: evidencing how it can help our business

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: I would not want it automatically acting on my behalf

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: immense satisfaction in troubleshooting code or sense-checking your coding approach

nodes.label: Frustration with browser performance and context loss
nodes.grounding_span: the screen becomes laggy and the AI is painful to converse with

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: AI will become more pervasive in every facet of my role and I will continue to promote its widespread use

nodes.label: Dismissal of replacement risk for skilled workers
Iterative back-and-forth questioning
nodes.grounding_span: simply asking 'tell me more about Azure Functions, I've never worked with them before and don't understand what they are or how they work'

nodes.label: Evaluative and selective acceptance of AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: externally validating that Azure Functions can do and if the discussed approach is actually viable
